pages.name: Home
pages.description: Entry point for the site, highlighting key services, quick links to quotes, bookings, deals, gallery, and service area.
primary_functions: Provide quick access to Get a Quote, Services, Deals, Gallery, Service Area, and Crews & Reviews
Highlight core driveway and paving services, including asphalt, concrete, sealing, and snow removal
Surface key CTAs for immediate actions like requesting a quote or booking a service

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click primary hero CTA "Get a Quote"
Click featured service card "Concrete Driveways"
Click featured service card "Driveway Sealing"
Click featured service card "Snow Removal"
Click home section CTA "View Deals"
Click home section CTA "View Project Gallery"
Click home section CTA "Check Service Area"
Click home section CTA "See Our Crews"

access_methods.description: Users can land directly via root URL or external links

pages.name: Service Detail / Services Overview
pages.description: Lists all service categories and, when a serviceId is provided, shows detailed information, packages, and plans for that specific service.
primary_functions: Display an overview of all services (e.g., concrete driveways, driveway sealing, snow removal, asphalt resurfacing, asphalt replacement)
For a selected service (service.html?serviceId=concrete_driveways or driveway_sealing or snow_removal), show packages/plans with size suitability, price, and warranty information
Allow users to identify suitable packages for specific driveway sizes and warranty/budget criteria
Provide 'Book Now', 'Select Plan', or 'Sign Up' buttons that lead into the booking flow for the chosen package or plan

incoming_params.description: ID of the service to show in detail (e.g., concrete_driveways, driveway_sealing, snow_removal). If omitted, page shows overview of all services.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Book Now", "Select Package", or "Sign Up" on a specific service package/plan
Click secondary CTA "Request an Estimate" from a service detail section

access_methods.description: Header link "Services" opens service.html (overview or last-viewed state)
Deep links from other pages pass serviceId to show a specific service

pages.name: Quote Request
pages.description: Generic quote and estimate request form for driveway and paving services, accessible directly or pre-configured via promotions or crew pages.
primary_functions: Let users select a service type (e.g., Asphalt Resurfacing, Asphalt Driveway Replacement, General Driveway Paving)
Capture project details such as driveway size and units, material/finish options (e.g., Standard, Premium), and scheduling preferences (date picker and time slot selection)
Collect contact information (name, phone, email) to submit quote or estimate requests
Support pre-filled context via URL parameters (e.g., crew-specific estimates from crew.html or promoCode from promotions.html)

incoming_params.description: Promo code selected from a deal to prefill into the quote request.
Crew ID when quote is requested in the context of a specific crew; used to pre-select suggested service type.
Canonical service_type to pre-select in the quote form (e.g., asphalt_resurfacing).
Origin of navigation to quote.html, used for analytics and to set QuoteRequest.source_page.

outgoing_connections.trigger: After submitting a quote successfully, click optional CTA "Book This Service Now"

access_methods.description: Header link "Get a Quote" opens quote.html
Direct links from emails or ads can open quote.html with promoCode or crewId parameters

pages.name: Booking
pages.description: Configuration form for booking a selected service package or plan before review, including size, schedule, payment preference, and customer details.
primary_functions: Display selected service, package, or plan details carried over from service.html (e.g., specific concrete driveway or sealing plan)
Allow users to enter driveway size or type (e.g., 600 sq ft, 2-car driveway, 50 ft length) and confirm measurement units
Provide scheduling controls (date picker with weekdays/weekends and time slot options) for service appointments
Offer payment and billing options such as Credit/Debit Card and Pay per Season versus other billing modes
Collect customer information (name, phone, email) and proceed via a 'Continue' or 'Schedule Service' button to booking_review.html

incoming_params.description: Service.id for which the booking is being created (e.g., concrete_driveways, driveway_sealing, snow_removal).
ServicePackage.id chosen on the services or promotions page, if booking is for a specific package/plan.
Promotion code associated with a deal; stored on the draft booking and applied later on the review page.
Origin of booking flow (service_page, promotions_page, home_page, quote_page) mapped to Booking.source_page.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click primary button "Continue" / "Proceed to Review" after filling booking details

access_methods.description: Accessed with serviceId/servicePackageId when user starts booking from services, deals, or quote flows
Reached implicitly after selecting a package and clicking "Book Now" / "Sign Up" on service.html or promotions.html

pages.name: Booking Review / Checkout
pages.description: Summary page to review booking details, apply promo codes, and finalize booking or sign-up requests.
primary_functions: Display a summary of selected service, package/plan, driveway size, date, time, and price estimate
Provide a promo code/coupon field where users can enter and apply codes found on promotions.html for eligible projects (e.g., 15%+ for 500+ sq ft)
Show updated pricing after applying promo codes or discounts
Allow users to confirm or adjust contact details if needed and finalize the booking or enrollment

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Edit Details" to go back and change size, schedule, or payment options

access_methods.description: Reached after submitting the booking form on booking.html
Direct bookmarking is possible but page expects an existing draft booking in local state

pages.name: Promotions & Special Offers
pages.description: List of current promotions and promo codes for driveway, paving, and related services, including eligibility criteria.
primary_functions: Present all deals with clear discount percentages, minimum project sizes, and eligible service types
Allow users to identify promo codes that offer at least 15% off for projects of 500 sq ft or more
Provide 'Use Offer' or 'Book Now' buttons that deep-link into quote.html or service.html with relevant context (e.g., promoCode or serviceId)
Educate users about offer terms and expiration dates

incoming_params.description: Optional filter to only show promotions meeting a minimum percentage discount (e.g., 15).
Optional filter to only show promotions eligible for projects at or above a given size (e.g., 500).

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Book Now" on a promotion that is designed to start a booking flow (e.g., 15% off driveway install)
Click "Use Offer" on promotions that apply to quote-only flows

access_methods.description: Promotions may be linked directly from email campaigns

pages.name: Project Gallery
pages.description: Filterable gallery of completed driveway and paving projects, including asphalt, concrete, and other surfaces.
primary_functions: Allow users to filter projects by type (e.g., Asphalt Driveways), size range (e.g., 400–800 sq ft), and completion date (e.g., last 2 years)
Display visual tiles/cards of filtered projects with key summary details such as size, type, and completion date
Let users click any project to open its full details on project.html
Support discovery of similar projects to inspire new quotes or bookings

incoming_params.description: Preselected surface type filter (e.g., asphalt, concrete).
Minimum driveway size filter, used for ranges like 400–800 sq ft.
Maximum driveway size filter.
High-level filter for projects completed within the last N years (e.g., 2).

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a project tile/card in the gallery
Click header link or gallery CTA "View Saved Projects"

pages.name: Project Detail
pages.description: Detailed view of a single completed project with photos and specs, offering the ability to save it for later comparison.
primary_functions: Show project-specific information such as driveway type (e.g., asphalt), approximate size, completion date, and visuals
Provide an 'Add to Favorites', 'Save Project', or 'Add to Compare' button to store the project in the user's favorites list
Offer navigation back to the gallery and to adjacent projects within the filtered results

incoming_params.description: ID of the project to display in detail.

outgoing_connections.trigger: After adding a project to favorites, click CTA "View All Saved Projects"
Click "Back to Gallery" link

access_methods.description: Accessed via projectId parameter from the gallery or favorites list

pages.name: Favorites / Saved Projects
pages.description: Central place to view and compare all projects the user has saved from the gallery.
primary_functions: List all saved/favorited driveway projects, including those added from project.html
Allow users to quickly compare basic attributes (size, type, completion date) across their saved projects
Provide links back to individual project detail pages for deeper review
Let users remove projects from favorites if desired

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a project in the favorites list to open its detail view
Click CTA "Find More Projects"

pages.name: Service Area & ZIP Check
pages.description: Tool to check whether a ZIP code is within the service area and submit inquiries for out-of-area locations.
primary_functions: Provide a ZIP code search field to check coverage (e.g., entering 30301 and seeing whether it is served)
Display coverage results, including a list or map of serviced ZIP codes and highlight the nearest serviced ZIP if the searched ZIP is not covered
Allow users to click a serviced ZIP or area name to view more details about that area within the same page (e.g., service_area.html?areaId=nearest_zip)
Offer an embedded contact form with fields for name, email, phone, and message so users can request exceptions or ask about service in a non-served ZIP
Submit service area inquiries (e.g., asking if services can be provided in ZIP 30301 mentioning the nearest serviced ZIP)

incoming_params.description: Optional ZIP code to pre-populate the coverage checker (e.g., 30301).
Optional ServiceArea.id to highlight a specific service area in the list/map.

pages.name: Crews & Reviews Listing
pages.description: Directory of work crews or contractors with ratings and reviews, filterable by service type.
primary_functions: List available crews/teams with their overall rating, number of reviews, and key specialties
Provide filters or category controls to show only crews for a given service type (e.g., Asphalt Driveway Replacement)
Offer sorting options such as 'Rating: High to Low' to easily find top-rated crews
Allow users to click on a crew to open its detailed profile page on crew.html

incoming_params.description: Optional filter to show crews matching a specific canonical service_type (e.g., asphalt_driveway_replacement).
Sorting option such as "rating_desc" (Rating: High to Low).

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a crew name, card, or profile image

pages.name: Crew Profile
pages.description: Detailed profile of a specific crew, including services offered, ratings, and a dedicated estimate request form.
primary_functions: Show crew-specific details such as bio, service areas, service types, rating (e.g., 4.5+ stars), and total number of reviews (e.g., 50+)
Display user review snippets and trust indicators to support crew selection
Provide a prominent 'Request Estimate' or 'Get a Quote' button that reveals or scrolls to an embedded estimate request form on the same page

Allow users to complete an estimate request form selecting a service type (e.g., Asphalt Driveway Replacement), entering approximate driveway size, and providing contact details, then submit the request

incoming_params.description: ID of the crew whose profile and reviews should be displayed.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click optional link "Request a General Quote" from this crew's profile

access_methods.description: Accessed via crewId parameter from the crews listing or featured crew cards

pages.name: About Us
pages.description: Background and credibility information about the driveway and paving business.
primary_functions: Explain the company’s history, experience, and service philosophy
Highlight certifications, insurance, warranties, and local expertise
Reassure users about quality of work to support booking and quote decisions

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click CTA "View Our Services"

params.subject: General question after reading About Us

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click CTA "Contact Us"

pages.name: FAQ
pages.description: Answers to common questions about driveway services, booking, warranties, and maintenance.
primary_functions: Provide concise answers to recurring questions about materials, processes, timelines, and preparation
Explain warranty terms, maintenance recommendations (e.g., sealing intervals), and seasonal service details
Reduce the need for direct contact by addressing common concerns in advance

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click link "Still have questions? Contact us"

pages.name: Contact Us
pages.description: General-purpose contact page for inquiries not tied to a specific area or booking flow.
primary_functions: Provide a simple contact form for general questions, feedback, or special requests
Display business contact details such as phone number, email, and office hours
Offer alternative contact methods for users who do not wish to use the booking or service area forms

incoming_params.description: Optional subject line prefill for the contact form (e.g., "Question about warranties").
Optional Service.id reference when contacting about a specific service.

pages.name: Privacy Policy
pages.description: Information on how customer data and inquiries are collected, stored, and used.
primary_functions: Explain what personal data is collected through quote requests, bookings, and contact forms
Describe how data is stored, protected, and shared, if at all
Help users understand their privacy rights and choices regarding their information

pages.name: Terms & Conditions
pages.description: Legal terms governing use of the website and high-level service conditions.
primary_functions: Define the terms of using the website and submitting requests or bookings
Outline general service-related terms such as estimates, scheduling, and limitations
Clarify liability, disclaimers, and user responsibilities

header_links.description: Homepage with quick access to all major driveway and paving tasks
Overview of all driveway, paving, sealing, and snow removal services
Request a quote or estimate for driveway and paving services
View current promotions and special offers with promo codes
Browse completed driveway and paving projects
Check ZIP code coverage and request service area exceptions
See crews, ratings, and reviews for driveway and paving work
View saved driveway project examples for comparison

footer_links.description: Learn more about the driveway and paving company
Frequently asked questions about services and bookings
General contact information and inquiry form
Overview of available services and packages
Service coverage map and ZIP checker
Information about data collection and privacy
Legal terms for using the site and services
